title: centaurea prostrata var. straminea
intro: Centaurea prostrata var. straminea, also known as mountain centaury, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family, characterized by its small white flowers and low-growing habit. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Centaurea prostrata var. straminea include its potential to treat digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
